testcase.name: test_public_routes[/api/generate/story/age-groups-GET-expected_codes2]
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_p0_system_audit_iteration143.py:241: in test_public_routes assert response.status_code in expected_codes, f"{endpoint} returned {response.status_code}: {response.text[:200]}" E AssertionError: /api/generate/story/age-groups returned 404: {"detail":"Not Found"} E assert 404 in [200] E + where 404 = <Response [404]>.status_code
